disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Cruise passenger from deadly hantavirus outbreak says she's 'held hostage' in quarantine fight - Yahoo
updates.body_en: Cruise passenger from deadly hantavirus outbreak says she's 'held hostage' in quarantine fight Yahoo
updates.summary_zh: 邮轮乘客因汉坦病毒疫情隔离，称被扣为人质。

updates.title_en: Scientists track single-dose vaccines for Andes hantavirus strain - Medical Xpress
updates.body_en: Scientists track single-dose vaccines for Andes hantavirus strain Medical Xpress
updates.summary_zh: 科学家追踪安第斯汉坦病毒单剂疫苗。

updates.title_en: Twenty-one countries launch coordinated Andes virus research initiative following hantavirus outbreak - World Health Organization (WHO)
updates.body_en: Twenty-one countries launch coordinated Andes virus research initiative following hantavirus outbreak World Health Organization (WHO)
updates.summary_zh: 21国启动安第斯病毒研究合作。

updates.title_en: Fatal outbreak fears spark $750,000 rescue mission - The Independent
updates.body_en: Fatal outbreak fears spark $750,000 rescue mission The Independent
updates.summary_zh: 致命疫情引发75万美元救援任务。

updates.title_en: Single-dose vaccine provides complete protection against Andes hantavirus - News-Medical
updates.body_en: Single-dose vaccine provides complete protection against Andes hantavirus News-Medical
updates.summary_zh: 单剂疫苗对安第斯汉坦病毒完全保护。

updates.title_en: San Quentin prison reports possible hantavirus case - Marin Independent Journal
updates.body_en: San Quentin prison reports possible hantavirus case Marin Independent Journal
updates.summary_zh: 圣昆廷监狱报告疑似汉坦病毒病例。

updates.title_en: Two more passengers exposed to hantavirus leave UNMC quarantine in Omaha - KETV
updates.body_en: Two more passengers exposed to hantavirus leave UNMC quarantine in Omaha KETV
updates.summary_zh: 美国奥马哈内布拉斯加医学中心两名接触汉坦病毒的乘客解除隔离。

updates.title_en: CDC and Florida at odds over hantavirus cruise ship passenger’s quarantine - NBC News
updates.body_en: CDC and Florida at odds over hantavirus cruise ship passenger’s quarantine NBC News
updates.summary_zh: 美国CDC与佛罗里达州就汉坦病毒邮轮乘客隔离问题产生分歧。

updates.title_en: US puts up $750K to evacuate an American who was aboard hantavirus cruise ship from remote island - CNN
updates.body_en: US puts up $750K to evacuate an American who was aboard hantavirus cruise ship from remote island CNN
updates.summary_zh: 美国出资75万美元从偏远岛屿撤离一名汉坦病毒邮轮乘客。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus Cruise Passenger Says She’s Being Held ‘Hostage’ In Nebraska Quarantine (Latest Updates) - Forbes
updates.body_en: Hantavirus Cruise Passenger Says She’s Being Held ‘Hostage’ In Nebraska Quarantine (Latest Updates) Forbes
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒邮轮乘客称在内布拉斯加隔离中被扣为人质。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus-hit cruise ship set to resume voyages after disinfection - Baird Maritime
updates.body_en: Hantavirus-hit cruise ship set to resume voyages after disinfection Baird Maritime
updates.summary_zh: 受汉坦病毒影响的邮轮在消毒后恢复航行。

updates.title_en: Table for one: Exposed to deadly hantavirus, man is eating his way through quarantine - Flatwater Free Press
updates.body_en: Table for one: Exposed to deadly hantavirus, man is eating his way through quarantine Flatwater Free Press
updates.summary_zh: 美国一男子接触汉坦病毒后隔离，通过进食度过隔离期。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus: UK Reports Confirmed Case in Tristan da Cunha, Says WHO Chief - Health and Me
updates.body_en: Hantavirus: UK Reports Confirmed Case in Tristan da Cunha, Says WHO Chief Health and Me
updates.summary_zh: 英国在特里斯坦达库尼亚报告一例汉坦病毒确诊病例，WHO 总干事确认。

updates.title_en: Andes Virus Outbreak on a Cruise Ship: Current Situation | Hantavirus - Centers for Disease Control and Prevention | CDC (.gov)
updates.body_en: Andes Virus Outbreak on a Cruise Ship: Current Situation | Hantavirus Centers for Disease Control and Prevention | CDC (.gov)
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 发布邮轮上 Andes 病毒（汉坦病毒）暴发最新情况。

updates.title_en: Possible hantavirus case at San Quentin prompts testing, decontamination - San Francisco Chronicle
updates.body_en: Possible hantavirus case at San Quentin prompts testing, decontamination San Francisco Chronicle
updates.summary_zh: 旧金山圣昆廷监狱出现疑似汉坦病毒病例，已启动检测和消毒。

updates.title_en: San Quentin Rehabilitation Center investigating possible case of hantavirus in 38-year-old male inmate - ABC7 Bay Area
updates.body_en: San Quentin Rehabilitation Center investigating possible case of hantavirus in 38-year-old male inmate ABC7 Bay Area
updates.summary_zh: 圣昆廷监狱调查一名 38 岁男性囚犯的疑似汉坦病毒病例。
